zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe於大約1208年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Oliver de Champernon38歲，母親Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan34歲。他於1245年之前與Dionysia English在英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe于大约1208年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Oliver de Champernon38岁，母亲Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan34岁。他于1245年之前与Dionysia English在英国戴文布洛阿可利斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe was born about 1208, in Devon, England, his father, Oliver de Champernon, was 38 and his mother, Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan, was 34. He married Dionysia English before 1245, in Broadclyst, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1272, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

Il a épousé Dionysia English avant 1245, à Broadclyst, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1272, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe um 1208 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Oliver de Champernon 38 und seine Mutter Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan 34. Er hat vor 1245 in Broadclyst, Devon, England Dionysia English geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1272 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Dionysia English prima del 1245, nel Broadclyst, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1272, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Oliver de Champernon(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1245년 이전 영국 데폰 브로드클리스트에서 Dionysia English(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe родился около 1208 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Oliver de Champernon было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Dionysia English перед 1245 г. в местности броадклист, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1272 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
